# Contributing

Thanks for your interest! Here's how you can help.

## Report a Data Error

If a report contains incorrect star counts, broken links, or wrong descriptions, open an [Issue](../issues/new) with:

- **Date** of the report (e.g., `2026-05-28`)
- **Field** that's wrong (e.g., `today_stars`, `description`, `url`)
- **Correct value** with a source link if possible

## Improve a Description

Chinese descriptions are hand-crafted summaries. If one misrepresents a project, submit a PR editing the specific `.html` file with a corrected `repo-desc` text.

## Suggest Visual Styles

Each report uses a distinct visual aesthetic. Open a Discussion with your style idea — reference existing design movements (Brutalism, Swiss Grid, Art Deco, Vaporwave, etc.).

## Code of Conduct

Be constructive. Data accuracy > aesthetics > everything else.
